additional_rules.name: hardcoded-secrets-in-values
additional_rules.message: Hardcoded secret detected in values.yaml — secrets must never be stored in Helm values.
additional_rules.fix_hint: Use ExternalSecret, SealedSecret, or reference a K8s Secret via secretKeyRef. Never commit plaintext credentials.

additional_rules.name: privileged-container
additional_rules.message: Privileged container detected — this grants full host access and breaks container isolation.
additional_rules.fix_hint: Remove privileged: true. Add only the specific capabilities needed via securityContext.capabilities.add.

additional_rules.name: missing-user-instruction
additional_rules.message: Dockerfile has no USER instruction — container will run as root by default.
additional_rules.fix_hint: Add a non-root user (adduser/addgroup) and a USER instruction before CMD/ENTRYPOINT.

additional_rules.name: latest-tag-in-image
additional_rules.message: Image uses :latest tag — defeats reproducibility and safe rollback.
additional_rules.fix_hint: Pin to a specific version (semver or git SHA). Example: image: nginx:1.25.4

additional_rules.name: missing-health-probes
additional_rules.message: Deployment has no liveness or readiness probes — K8s cannot detect unhealthy pods.
additional_rules.fix_hint: Add livenessProbe and readinessProbe to every container spec. Use /healthz for liveness and /readyz for readiness.

additional_rules.name: missing-resource-limits
additional_rules.message: Container has no resource limits — risks noisy-neighbor issues and node instability.
additional_rules.fix_hint: Add resources.requests and resources.limits for both cpu and memory to every container.

additional_rules.name: no-network-policies
additional_rules.message: No NetworkPolicy found in chart — all pod-to-pod traffic is allowed by default.
additional_rules.fix_hint: Add a default-deny NetworkPolicy and whitelist required ingress/egress paths.
